## Why It Matters

This is the framework-level landing page for the App Router model used by the docs site. It frames the major concepts that matter downstream: file-system routing, layouts, navigation, and the split between server and client components.

## Key Excerpts

> "The App Router is a file-system based router that uses React's latest features such as Server Components, Suspense, and Server Functions."

> "Learn the fundamentals of building an App Router project, from installation to layouts, navigation, server and client components."

> "Project Structure"

> "Server and Client Components"

## Capture Notes

- The page is an overview hub, not a detailed reference page.
- Its value is architectural: it points to the canonical Next.js concepts that sit underneath Fumadocs layouts and routing.
